name: reurgency
description: reUrgency's marketplace — tools that make AI-assisted engineering faster and more reliable across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot.

metadata.description: reUrgency's marketplace of AI-assisted engineering tools.

plugins.name: deep-skills
plugins.description: The Deep-* series — planning → review → implementation → code-review → bug-fix → docs as one coherent, fresh-agent-resumable workflow, with a self-improving directive loop.

plugins.name: overton-snapshot
plugins.description: Scenario-aware context snapshots for zero-context agent handoffs, plus a context-usage statusline and an over-threshold nudge.

plugins.name: sym-visualizer
plugins.description: Find every symlink under a folder and turn it into a Markdown report, a CSV table, and a self-contained interactive graph of where each link points.
